engineer.description: General purpose engineer agent for technical questions, debugging, and architecture discussions

designer.description: General purpose designer agent for UX, accessibility, and design decisions

engineer-review.description: Review a file from an engineering perspective (technical feasibility, architecture)

designer-review.description: Review a file from a design perspective (UX, accessibility, design patterns)

prd-review.description: Comprehensive file review using all four agent perspectives

init-project.description: Initialize a new project from this template
